title: MUN KHAT AH GELIN THUNGENKHIAN NING

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sep ding a kilawm lopi ka sem kha a,
Gen ding a kilawm lopi ka genkha hi,
Tua hun ciang hih ka sep ding,
Mun khat ah gelin thungenkhian ning.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lam hong pi ding Topa pha ke'n nei lel ing,
Mun khat ah gelin thungenkhian ning.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nisim a hong piak thupha teng phat peuh le'ng,
Ka thuumna khempeuh hong dawng cih ka thei hi,
Ka vangik khempeuh hong dawnkhia hi.
